Name: mat_sunmoss
FlavorText: Soft, warm, endlessly renewing. The kindest material in the world, and the most thoughtless.

Name: mat_softfiber
FlavorText: Pulled from the gentle meadow growth. Binds almost anything.

Name: mat_gentlestone
FlavorText: Sun-warmed rock from the hollow. Heavier than it looks, kinder than it sounds.

Name: mat_swallowedwood
FlavorText: Timber reclaimed from homes the Bloom ate. Still faintly shaped by the rooms it used to be.

Name: mat_resin
FlavorText: Sticky sap the Overgrowth never stops weeping.

Name: mat_glowcap
FlavorText: A fungus that forgot how to wilt. It glows on, and on.

Name: mat_stillsteel
FlavorText: Salvage from the dormant machines. It holds an edge and, the smiths swear, a mood.

Name: mat_sealstone
FlavorText: Dense stone the old works used to contain things. It remembers being a wall.

Name: mat_hushglass
FlavorText: Formed where the light went thin and slow. Looks like a held breath.

Name: mat_gardenlight
FlavorText: Not gathered. Given, or not, depending on how the story ends.

Name: comp_binding
FlavorText: Fiber and resin, worked into something that holds.

Name: comp_fitting
FlavorText: A salvaged part whose original purpose is labeled in a script no one can read.

Name: food_warmbroth
FlavorText: Restores stamina and a little of something the world forgot the name for.

Name: item_repair_kit
FlavorText: A tidy bundle for mending what the work wears down. Tools come back so easily, you almost forget the things that don't.
